# startPoint

**Instance Property**

The starting point along the envelope’s duration.

## Declaration

```swift
var startPoint: simd_double2 { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the value of this property to the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEnvelope/init(startPoint:segments:)] argument.

## Inspecting the Envelope

- **evaluate(x:)**: Provides the height of the envelope for an input value.
- **segments**: An array of the envelope’s segments.
